description_long: This object is a silver, four-door station wagon with a sunroof, parked on a patch of concrete. The vehicle features a streamlined body with a gently sloping roofline and a rear hatch, typical of modern urban family cars. The windows are tinted, and the wheels are dark-colored alloys, giving the car a contemporary appearance. The front end has a distinct grille and headlight assembly, while the rear includes a prominent tailgate and taillights. The car's surface is smooth and reflective, with visible panel lines and door handles. The surrounding ground is a roughly cut section of pavement, suggesting the car is isolated from its usual environment.
description: A silver station wagon with a sunroof, dark alloy wheels, and tinted windows, parked on a concrete patch. The car has a sleek, modern design with detailed front and rear features.
description_view_0: The left side and front of the silver station wagon are visible, highlighting the sunroof, front grille, and left headlight.
description_view_1: The front and right side of the car are shown, emphasizing the grille, headlights, and right-side body contours.
description_view_2: The rear and left side of the vehicle are visible, showing the tailgate, taillights, and left rear wheel.
description_view_3: The rear and right side of the car are shown, focusing on the tailgate, right taillight, and rear window.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: No wings present; this object does not have a wingspan configuration.
attribute_engine_type: No visible aircraft engines; appears to have an automotive internal combustion engine under the hood.
attribute_tail_design: No aircraft tail; features a conventional car rear hatch and taillights.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Four automotive wheels, fixed, typical of road vehicles.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit typical of a car, with multi-seat configuration and standard windshield and side windows.
